actors.name: Donald Trump
actors.blurb: Donald Trump remains the central figure in the U.S. political landscape, driving significant coverage due to his administration's policies, international tensions, and domestic controversies. His recent statements on Iran's peace proposal, military actions, and economic policies have kept him at the forefront of global news cycles. Additionally, his interactions with global leaders and domestic political figures continue to generate debate and media attention.

actors.name: Péter Magyar
actors.blurb: Péter Magyar is generating significant coverage as Hungary's incoming Prime Minister, with his recent appointments, policy announcements, and political maneuvers drawing both praise and criticism. His actions, including the appointment of his brother-in-law as a minister and his plans to address Hungary's severe drought, have sparked debates about governance and nepotism.
